Package org.eventb.internal.pp.core.provers.equality

Interface IInstantiationResult

All Known Implementing Classes:
InstantiationResult
public interface IInstantiationResult
Interface for instantiation results.

For now, instantiations are given only for equalities that have exactly one constant and one variable.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    EqualityLiteral
    getEquality()
    Returns the equality in which the instantiation can be applied.
    Constant
    getInstantiationValue()
    Returns the value with which the variable in the equality getEquality() can be instantiated.
    Set<Clause>
    getSolvedClauses()
    Returns the list of clause in which the instantiation can be applied.
    Set<Clause>
    getSolvedValueOrigin()
    Returns the clauses that were used to find the instantiation.

  • Method Details

    • getSolvedClauses

      Set<Clause> getSolvedClauses()
      Returns the list of clause in which the instantiation can be applied. Corresponds to the clauses in which the equality getEquality() appears.
      Returns:
      the list of clause in which the instantiation can be applied

    • getEquality

      EqualityLiteral getEquality()
      Returns the equality in which the instantiation can be applied.
      Returns:
      the equality in which the instantiation can be applied

    • getInstantiationValue

      Constant getInstantiationValue()
      Returns the value with which the variable in the equality getEquality() can be instantiated.
      Returns:
      the value with which the variable in the equality getEquality() can be instantiated

    • getSolvedValueOrigin

      Set<Clause> getSolvedValueOrigin()
      Returns the clauses that were used to find the instantiation.
      Returns:
      the clauses that were used to find the instantiation
